commands.author: libra-dev-agent

target.title: Normalize sessions_send message aliases
target.body:
Fixes #88146

Note: this pull request was made with AI assistance.

## Summary
- Allow `sessions_send` / `send_to_task` tool calls to pass schema validation when models emit `SendMessage`, `content`, or `text` instead of `message`.
- Normalize the first non-empty body alias to `message` before dispatch, matching the existing message-tool alias behavior.
- Refresh the generated prompt snapshots and add regression coverage that confirms `SendMessage` reaches the agent dispatch path.

## Verification
- `docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-sessions-rebase:/workspace -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo/node_modules:/workspace/node_modules -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check'` (`Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).`)
- `docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-sessions-rebase:/workspace -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo/node_modules:/workspace/node_modules -w /workspace -e OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts'` (36 tests passed)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Model-generated A2A sends using `SendMessage` no longer fail schema validation before `sessions_send` can dispatch to the target session.

Real environment tested: Containerized OpenClaw checkout using `node:24-bookworm` with workspace dependencies installed.

Exact steps or commands run after this patch:
```console
$ docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-sessions-rebase:/workspace -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo/node_modules:/workspace/node_modules -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check'
Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

$ docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-sessions-rebase:/workspace -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo/node_modules:/workspace/node_modules -w /workspace -e OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts'
RUN v4.1.7 /workspace
✓ agents-tools ../../src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts (36 tests) 5317ms
Test Files 1 passed (1)
Tests 36 passed (36)
```

Observed result after fix: The patched sessions tool accepted the `SendMessage` alias and dispatched the normalized body in the focused regression, and generated prompt snapshots are current on the rebased branch.

What was not tested: A live Anthropic/Pi model emitting `SendMessage` in a multi-agent gateway run.
